title: Alchemical Power
description: This mod provides a simple but powerful alchemy. And food.
body:
⚠️ Note: This mod is currently under development.
For details on updates and changes, please refer to the GitHub page or the in-game manual. This text was translated using DeepL, ChatGPT, and other AI tools. Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alchemical-power) / Modrinth.
Versions prior to v1.1.0 are available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alchemical-power). # 🧪 **Alchemical Power**
Alchemical Power is a simple yet powerful alchemy-themed mod.
Transmute ores, convert items, craft slightly stronger tools… and ultimately pour all your gathered resources into creating the Philosopher’s Stone, the pinnacle of alchemy! ## 🔑**Key Features** ### 1. 🧰 _Unique Crafting Tables_
Use special crafting tables that support larger grids like 5×5 and 13×13. ### 2. 🔩 _Metal & Gem Enhancement_
Enhance common metals and gems into special materials.
These enhanced tools don’t have unique abilities, but they are slightly stronger than usual. ### 3. ⛏️ _Ore Multiplication_
You can multiply a single ore by more than double using the power of runes. With the Philosopher's Stone, that multiplication factor reaches an astonishing 16,777,216x.
You’ll never run out of resources again… although the cost does scale accordingly. ### 4. 🍲 _Tons of Cooking Recipes_
Since alchemy and cooking are basically the same (probably), this mod adds a wide variety of food recipes.
Includes new crops like tomatoes and cabbages (not cultivatable). ## 🛠️ **Requirements**
Minecraft: 1.20.1
Mod Loader: Forge
Required Mods: Patchouli / Curios API
Recommended: JEI or REI (for recipe viewing)
### 📜**Future Plans**
We’re constantly working to expand and refine Alchemical Power to make it even more engaging.
Here’s a glimpse at what’s coming in future updates: 1. 🐾 _New Mobs_
Adding new hostile, friendly, and tradeable mobs to expand gameplay variety. 2. 💎 _Ore Doubling for Other Mods_
Supporting ore doubling mechanics for ores introduced by other mods. 3. 🛠 _Recipe Fixes & Balancing_
Adjusting and fine-tuning existing recipes for better balance and consistency.
